privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: This Privacy Policy explains how Smart Agriwaste collects, uses, and protects information when you use the platform.

informationCollected.heading: Information We Collect
informationCollected.body1: We may collect the details you provide while using Smart Agriwaste, including your name, contact information, account details, location, and information related to waste listings, orders, or negotiations.
informationCollected.body2: We may also collect technical information such as device type, browser details, log data, and usage activity to keep the platform secure and improve performance.

howWeUseInformation.heading: How We Use Information
howWeUseInformation.body1: We use your information to create and manage accounts, connect farmers and buyers, process activity on the platform, provide support, and communicate important service updates.
howWeUseInformation.body2: Information may also be used for analytics, fraud prevention, legal compliance, and improving product features that help agricultural waste management workflows.

sharing.heading: Sharing of Information
sharing.body1: We may share limited information with service providers, technical partners, or other users when it is necessary to operate core features such as authentication, communication, delivery coordination, or payments.
sharing.body2: We do not sell your personal information. We may disclose data when required by law, to protect users, or to enforce our platform policies.

choicesAndSecurity.heading: Your Choices and Data Security
choicesAndSecurity.body1: You can review or update certain profile details from your account. If you want us to delete your account data or have a privacy concern, please contact the platform support team.
choicesAndSecurity.body2: We use reasonable safeguards to protect stored data, but no online system can guarantee absolute security. You should also keep your login credentials secure.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: These Terms of Service describe the rules, responsibilities, and conditions for using Smart Agriwaste.

acceptance.heading: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.body1: By accessing or using Smart Agriwaste, you agree to follow these Terms of Service and any applicable laws or platform guidelines.
acceptance.body2: If you do not agree with these terms, you should not use the platform.

platformUse.heading: Use of the Platform
platformUse.body1: You agree to provide accurate account information and to use the platform only for lawful activities related to agricultural waste management, marketplace participation, and community engagement.
platformUse.body2: You must not misuse the service, interfere with its operation, attempt unauthorized access, or submit false, harmful, or misleading content.

responsibilities.heading: Listings, Orders, and User Responsibilities
responsibilities.body1: Users are responsible for the accuracy of listings, pricing, availability, negotiations, and communication with other users. Smart Agriwaste may facilitate discovery and coordination, but it does not guarantee every transaction.
responsibilities.body2: Each user is responsible for complying with local laws, safety requirements, transportation obligations, and quality standards connected to their activities on the platform.

liability.heading: Suspension and Limitation of Liability
liability.body1: We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms, create risk for other users, or harm the platform.
liability.body2: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Smart Agriwaste is not liable for indirect losses, user disputes, or damages arising from third-party actions, failed transactions, or temporary service interruptions.
